snippet.title: Albina - Tick-Tock - Croatia 🇭🇷 - National Final Performance - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Albina will represent Croatia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Tick-Tock. She won Dora 2021, the Croatian national selection show for the Eurovision Song Contest.

Video by: HRT

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision

► Amazon: http://smarturl.it/Fobije/az

Music, arrangement & mix: Joca Stefanović
Lyrics: Jovana Radosavljević


#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije

Producer: Aleksandar Pejčić
Video Production: NN-media +38162357368

Editing: Nemanja Novaković/Aleksandar Kasalica

Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

snippet.description:

Muzika: Aleksandra Milutinović

Tekst: Aleksandra Milutinović
Aranžman i produkcija: Aleksandra Milutinović, Dušan Alagić
Mix: Dejan Vučković 
Programing, klavijature, gitare, prateći vokali: Aleksandra Milutinović
Klavijature, gitare: Dušan Alagić

Snimano u studiju: Alagić u noći, Croatia Records
Mixano u studiju: MrGood
Tonski snimatelji: Dušan Alagić, Mauro Širol

Reditelj: Filip Gržinčić
Producent videa : Slađana Gržinčić
Produkcija videa : Gržinčić Creative Visuals

Tijana Bogicevic Style: Helen Babić 

Make up (Tijana & Damir):
Iva Berišić za IBeauty studio
Cavtatska 2, Rijeka
@IBeauty studio Rijeka by Iva Berišić
https://www.instagram.com/ivaberisic/
https://www.facebook.com/IvaBerisicMakeUp/
Kontakt : Iva +385 955316941

Hair (Tijana & Damir):
Doris Crljen za Frizerski salon Ars
frizerskisalonars@gmail.com
https://instagram.com/frizerski.salon.ars
https://www.facebook.com/salonars
Kontakt: Doris +385 916198908 

Official shoes (Damir): dr Martens 

https://instagram.com/shoebedoshops

Producent projekta: Snježana  Jerković Radočaj, Aleksandra Milutinović, Tijana Bogicević
Partner projekta: Dr. Vivian’s estetics 
Web: https://drvivianestetics.com
FB: https://www.facebook.com/Dr.Vivian.Estetics/
IG: @dr.vivianestetics (https://www.instagram.com/dr.vivianestetics/) 

Hvala:
Konjičkom klubu Njivice. Laura Kolić i Peter Požar hvala na stpljenju i obuci. Bila nam je čast imati u spotu vaše plemenite životinje.  
Konji: Dona Hamdani 118 i Caliopa.
Vlasnica Caliope: Mia Kulić
Doktorici Vivian Jurković na poverenju, savetima i saradnji. 
Muzeju grada Rijeke i Palači šećerane na predivnoj lokaciji za snimanje.

Hvala Mauro Širol i Croatia recordsu na  tonskom snimanju. 


Connect with TIJANA BOGICEVIC on:
Facebook: http://fb.me/tijanabogicevicmusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tijanabogicevic_music/
Twitter: http://twitter.com/tijanab_music

Connect with DAMIR KEDZO on:
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/kedzo.official
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/damirkedzo 
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/DamirKedzo

Management & booking Damir Kedžo: 
Snježana Jerković Radočaj
snjezana@jrprodukcija.hr 
+385 98 1331122


TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..



Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: ULIČNI SVIRAČ SE OPROSTIO OD BALAŠEVIĆA: Poslušajte pesmu zbog koje se svi prolaznici naježe
snippet.description:
Ulični svirač Zoran koji Novosađane uglavnom uveseljava svojom muzikom i izvedbom na gitari, ove noće napravio je izuzetak i oprostio se od novosadskog mornara - Đorđa Balaševića. snippet.title: PRAVILA IGRE - JEDINA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Pravila Igre - Jedina // Gema Produkcija 2021.
Zabranjeno kopiranje! Svaka neovlaštena kopija bit će uklonjena!

Ivan Penezić, pjevač grupe Pravila Igre, podijelio je sjećanja na svoju najveću i najvažniju ljubavnu priču dosad. Vratio se na početak ljubavi sa Sarom Lizatović, samozatajnom djevojkom iz Zagreba, s kojom je dijelio ljubavne početke od malih nogu. Njihov se ljubavni roman proteže kroz čitavu mladost, uz dobre i pokoji loš trenutak, ali prožet brojnim osjećajima, rekao je Ivan. „Kako se desi da ti važno nije ono što je sveto bilo nekad prije“, prisjetio se u nastavku i ispričao kako ga je, nakon zaruka na Valentinovo, njegova djevojka ostavila – ni manje, ni više – pred oltarom te tako ostavila gorak okus prisjećanja na Dan zaljubljenih.

Upravo je ovo priča koju nam je otpjevao za klavirom, u novome spotu grupe Pravila Igre za pjesmu Jedina. Pjesma koja svojom glazbom i tekstom budi posebne emocije te daje naslutiti da je riječ o novome hitu u ovo doba godine. Nakon višestrukih glazbenih uspješnica, Pravila Igre ponovno povisuju ljestvicu te svojim novim glazbenim uratkom daju naslutiti da nas u 2021. godini očekuje niz njihovih glazbenih iznenađenja.

„Teško je opisati koliko nam je svaka pjesma posebna dok je stvaramo, ali zaista je tako – svaka od njih ostavlja svojevrsni upečatljivi trag u našoj karijeri. Pjesma 'Jedina' također je među našim omiljenim djelima, i čvrsto vjerujemo da će pronaći svoje mjesto u srcima naših slušatelja. Ona je posebna, emotivna, karakterna, i upravo to smo nastojali potkrijepiti pričom u glazbenom video spotu. Nadamo se da ćete uživati kao što smo i mi uživali stvarajući ju!“, izjavili su dečki iz Pravila Igre.

Pjesma Jedina započinje niz od planirana 4 singla u ovoj godini, a dečki kažu kako će, u skladu s nadolazećim okolnostima, spremno odraditi barem nekoliko (virtualnih) nastupa za svoje vjerne obožavatelje. Cjelokupnu podršku pružaju im i supružnici Buljan, autori i tzv. „hitmejkeri“ koji vjerno stoje iza svih njihovih glazbenih uspješnica.

Pratite nas: 
------------------

► Twitter: https://twitter.com/pravilaigre
► Web: http://www.pravilaigre.hr

TEKST:
------------------
Noćas plaši jače
tišina nego prije.
K'o dva stranca mi smo,
ništa isto nije.
Udara u grudi
pogled tvoj sa strane.
Od ljubavi znam samo
ostat' će mi rane.

Tako si daleka,
a dijeli nas tek sjena.
Mogao bi s tobom
bit' za sva vremena.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.

Jedina ako te
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

Naslonio sam glavu
na krilo samoći.
Ja i ona sami
u ovoj pustoj noći.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna, ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.
Jedina ako te,
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

TEKST:
------------------
Noćas plaši jače
tišina nego prije.
K'o dva stranca mi smo,
ništa isto nije.
Udara u grudi
pogled tvoj sa strane.
Od ljubavi znam samo
ostat' će mi rane.

Tako si daleka,
a dijeli nas tek sjena.
Mogao bi s tobom
bit' za sva vremena.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.

Jedina ako te
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

Naslonio sam glavu
na krilo samoći.
Ja i ona sami
u ovoj pustoj noći.
Kako li se desi
da ti važno nije?
Ono što je sveto 
bilo nekad prije.

Jedina, Jedina,
nije srce stijena hladna, ledena.
I nije Bog dao da,
da još ne'ko voli
kao tebe ja.
Jedina ako te,
ne'ko kao i ti meni ostavi,
bit' ću taj što čeka te.
Nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave,
nek' nas naše tuge opet sastave.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Krankšvester - Nova Zaraza (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Glazba: H. Marjanović - Sett (https://instagram.com/sett3000?igshid=1i4pzrdlbr63)
Tekst: Davor Miletić - 3ki Stil (https://instagram.com/3ki_stil?igshid=x8p0q2gig300)/ H. Marjanović - Sett 
Refren: Sis L
Aranžman: H. Marjanović - Sett
Mix i Master: Hrvoje Marjanović - Sett

VIDEO: 
Produkcija : Red Eye View (https://instagram.com/redeyeviewprod?igshid=dhyvc9dqwlub)
Režija : Marko Dalić (https://instagram.com/marko.s.dalic?igshid=1b0w6jm9kc1oh), Tomislav Dugandžić & Krankšvester (https://instagram.com/kranksvester_official?igshid=1tfsc10ze4ha3)
Montaža i Vizualni Efekti : Tomislav Dugandžić (https://instagram.com/tomredrum?igshid=co46rnn7fxoz)

BOOKING: zvone.pusic@gmail.com

Posebna zahvala ekipi koja je sudjelovala u stvaranjiu Nove Zaraze:
Sis L, Wana Kiiru (https://instagram.com/kiiruliiru?igshid=14lgsdlnzezca) i Senad Galijašević (Senna M)

Follow: 
Yem (https://instagram.com/yemhr?igshid=1labgfcrlf4nv)
Approved Shop (https://instagram.com/approved_shop?igshid=1a2a3jgok593n)

TEKST:
(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi!

(3ki Stil)
Digla si me s dna, sa tobom znam tko sam
Ostavljaš na meni trag ko bijelo ispod nosa
Dala si mi snagu zato šaljem ove pusice
Snagu kojom mogu isčupat rep konju iz guzice
Od ljubavi se živi, na poslu dat ću otkaz
Reć' ću svome šefu nek si nađe novog konja
Na fejsu si me dodala, otad si mi odana
Ti me ne bi nikad za drugi kurac prodala
Reko sam si Davore oduzet ćeš si život
A onda si mi prišla i počastila me pivom
Možda sam jedinac al u tebi vidim sestru
Bit će da zbog toga ja ne razmišljam o sexu
I majka mi je rekla da u tebi vidi snahu
Obeć'o sam ženi da ću je pretvoriti u baku
Neka misle da sam lud ali vjerujem u čuda
Neka cjepivo za krizu bude jebanje u šupak!

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

(Sett)
Tvoja me je ljubav bebo podigla iz groba
Na krilima od sreće letim iznad smoga
Letim iznad planina, šuma, elektrana
Zbog tvoje slatke ljubavi letim kao vrana
Letim kao pilot, veza mi je kokpit
Ak me srećo ostaviš ja ću ti se roknit
Blaka blaka i više me nema
Sjeti me se kad procvate prva krizantema
Ja bez tebe nemam razloga da živim
Nemam čemu da se divim mačko
Tvoja ljubav diže me sa poda
Ko žednoga voda, Skywalkera Yoda
Znači zbog tebe sam jači
Tvoja ljubav je Bugatti, tvoja ljubav je Versace
Kad god poželiš moje tijelo, imaš ga
Uvijek ću ti dat, bebo primaj ga u pičku!

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

(Sis L)
Ne mogu nam ništa vodene kozice
Španjolska gripa ni velike boginje
Pusti samo neka ljubav vodi te
Reci volim te (2X)

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

Zbog tvoje slatke ljubavi letim kao vrana
Letim kao pilot, veza mi je kokpit
Ak me srećo ostaviš ja ću ti se roknit
Blaka blaka i više me nema
Sjeti me se kad procvate prva krizantema
Ja bez tebe nemam razloga da živim
Nemam čemu da se divim mačko
Tvoja ljubav diže me sa poda
Ko žednoga voda, Skywalkera Yoda
Znači zbog tebe sam jači
Tvoja ljubav je Bugatti, tvoja ljubav je Versace
Kad god poželiš moje tijelo, imaš ga
Uvijek ću ti dat, bebo primaj ga u pičku!

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

(Sis L)
Ne mogu nam ništa vodene kozice
Španjolska gripa ni velike boginje
Pusti samo neka ljubav vodi te
Reci volim te (2X)

(Sis L)
Nova zaraza se širi, u trbuhu leptirići
Samo me ljubi i zažmiri, pusti da nas ljubav izliječi (2X)

Mix: Alan Dović 
Master: Dragutin Smokrović
 
Hvala svima koji su doprinijeli na setu i u stvaranju ove priče.
 
Booking i management: Mia Milovčić 
Kontakt: mia.milovcic@gmail.com 
Mob. 091/3434361

*Tekst*
 
Istina kao ružan san dolazi kad sklopim oci,
na prstima i kupa sjene u samoći.
Razgovaram, tim sjenama se tiho klanjam, 
uz novi krug pitanja. 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu. 
 
Spavaj, sanjaj
ja čuvat ću stražu,
a ako suze te pronađu 
javi 
 
Pjevaju li ptice kad ti zatreba stih ?
Vjeruj mi da mogu ja bih umjesto njih.
Čuvaju li kazaljke nas jutarnji mir ?
Odgovora nema gorko mirim se s tim...mirim se s tim. 
 
Ako stvorim je tu, sve drugo bit će mi lako.
Ako stvorim je tu, kraj sebe bar na kratko.
Dozivam ju, da u sjećanju ostane...ostane tu.

#matijacvek #ptice #popmusic
****

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.description:
Follow Tonči Huljić & Madre Badessa: 
http://www.toncihuljic.com
http://www.instagram.com/toncihuljic_official
http://www.facebook.com/TonciHuljic.MadreBadessa

Subscribe to Tonči & Madre Badessa: http://bit.ly/TonciHuljicMBYT

Premijera spota i pjesme "MARE LUDA".

Glazba: Tonči Huljić
Tekst: Vjekoslava Huljić
Aranžman: Tonči Huljić i Leo Škaro
Mix: Leo Škaro
Master: Goran Martinac

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Amazon

Listen:
Spotify - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Spotify
Deezer - http://bit.ly/MareLuda-Deezer

Produkcija: Pilot Studio 2021
Scenarij: Tonči Huljić
Režija: Vojan Koceić
Snimatelj: Bruno Bilonić
Stilist: Silvia Dvornik
Montaža / Kolor: Vojan Koceić
Glumci: Meri Kolić, Uršula Najev, Luka Čerjan, Denis Kalajžić
Hvala: HNK Split, Tihomir Marjanović

© Tonci Huljic & Madre Badessa - Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i postavljanje na druge kanale!

Inamora se duša samo jednon,
a maća miljun puti sva...
Nima sapuna da je opere,
ni šalbuna, sode kauštike,
kad je jubav satare...

Mare je isto jubila,
bila je kontra fameja...
Ka Romeo i Julija,
al se nije ubila, 
bidna je poludila...

A Mare luda smije se...
I sedan banki prošla je...
Nije ka siromaji
na kontejneru u nevoji,
bidna kopa ta zbog jubavi...

A Mare luda smije se,
ni ćeri, sina, fameje...
Po škovacama kopa ta,
ka i dite nedužna,
lipog lica svetica...

#TonciHuljic #MadreBadessa #MareLuda

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Life found beneath Antarctic ice sheet 'shouldn't be there'
snippet.description:
Biologists say the inadvertent discovery of sea life on a boulder underneath an Antarctic ice shelf and hundreds of kilometres challenges our understanding of how far organisms can live from sunlight.

A British Antarctic Survey team drilled through the 900-metre-thick Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and dropped a camera down the hole in search of mud on the seabed. To their surprise, the camera revealed a boulder ringed by animals. Video footage appear to show 16 sponges, accompanied by 22 unidentified animals which could include barnacles. It is the first time such immobile life has been found beneath an Antarctic ice sheet.  “There’s all sorts of reasons they shouldn’t be there,” says Huw Griffiths at the British Antarctic Survey, who analysed the footage.

Read more: https://www.newscientist.com/article/2267737-life-found-beneath-antarctic-ice-sheet-shouldnt-be-there/

Lyrics:
I’m on an island
Even when you’re close
Can’t take the silence
I’d rather be alone
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won’t be a burden if we both don’t hold a grudge
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: IZAŠAO JE IZ PODZEMLJA SA PRIČAMA OD KOJIH STAJE DAH Nebojša Tubić Žabac u Sceniranju 07.02.2021.
snippet.description:
Kontroverzni biznismen Nebojša Tubić Žabac ovonedeljni je gost emisiji "Sceniranje" na Kurir televiziji. 
Žabac je poznat kao čovek sa beogradskog asfalta, jedan je od poslednjih preživelih aktera mračnih devedesetih godina. On je poznavao gotovo sve ljude čija su se imena u to vreme povezivala sa podzemljem.
Pre devet godina greškom je upucan u jednom lokalu u Novom Sadu, ali je preživeo i kao takav ušao u Ginisovu knjigu rekorda.

#žabac #nebojšaTubić #podzemlje #mafija #kriminal #zemun #klan #ginis #estrada #beograd #kurir #kurirTelevizija #sceniranje

snippet.title: Emanet 120. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 120 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: MARKO ŠKUGOR - KAP VODE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Pratite Marka na društvenim mrežama:
https://www.instagram.com/markoskugor.official/
https://www.facebook.com/markoskugor.official

Pretplatite se na kanal:
http://bit.ly/MarkoŠkugorYT

Booking & management:
Hrvatska: +385 99 848 5374 / markoskugor.official@gmail.com                      
Slovenija i EU: +386 68 649 791 / info@finkram.si

MARKO ŠKUGOR - KAP VODE

Glazba: Marko Tomasović
Tekst: Josip Ralašić
Aranžman: Leo Škaro
Izdavač: Zvuci Mediterana

VIDEO PRODUKCIJA: Zupančič DESIGN Video

"KAP VODE"

Noćas dušu pred svima otvaram,
i cijelog sebe zauvijek tebi poklanjam.
Ovaj ples neka traje zauvijek,
tvoja je ljubav nemiru mom lijek.

Ref.
Moja si mirna luka na ovom moru nemira,   
A tvoja nježna ruka mom je srcu postelja.   
I na kraj svijeta, ako treba, ja sam spreman za tebe,
tvoja ljubav kap je vode usred pustinje.

Noćas si lijepa, najljepša od svih,
i sve riječi svijeta sad stanu mi u stih.
Al dovoljan je samo jedan pogled tih,
naša ljubav nije od običnih.

Zagrli me čvrsto, nikad ne puštaj,
sve dok dišem, dok mi sviće,
ova ljubav nema kraj. 

Kopiranje je zabranjeno, svaku neovlaštenu kopiju bit ćemo primorani ukloniti!

© Zvuci Mediterana, 2021.
tags: SAMO S TOBOM SAM UPOZNAO LJUBAV

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! ❤️
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! 🥺

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

snippet.title: Кастинг за филмску улогу у школи! | Диана у борби за улогу у филму
snippet.description:
Неочекивано за све, познати редитељи доћи ће у школу у којој Диана студира да би изабрали најбоље глумце за улогу у филму. Тинејџери ће морати да покажу своје глумачке вештине, након чега могу да преузму улогу у филму. Ко је боље припремљен? Да ли Диана и Дима имају прилику да преузму главну улогу? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o17XgklQbs8
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

hr.title: Kasting za filmsku ulogu u školi! | Diana u borbi za ulogu u filmu
hr.description:
Neočekivano za sve, poznati redatelji doći će u školu u kojoj Diana studira kako bi odabrali najbolje glumce za ulogu u filmu. Tinejdžeri će morati pokazati svoje glumačke vještine, nakon čega mogu preuzeti ulogu u filmu. Tko je bolje pripremljen? Imaju li Diana i Dima priliku preuzeti glavnu ulogu? Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
